query: How do I reset my password?

retrievedChunks.text: To reset your password, navigate to the account settings page and click the 'Reset Password' button. An email will be sent to your registered address.
Password reset instructions are located in the account settings section. Click reset password to receive an email.
You can change your password from the profile menu. Go to Settings > Security > Change Password.

finalAnswer: Go to account settings and click 'Reset Password'. You will receive a reset link via email.
